Read the following files and provide a summary of the Developer Connect-related code that needs to be replaced, and the current structure of depot_create, depot_destroy, and depot_initialize functions:

1. Tools/rbw/rbgp_Payor.sh - find depot_create and depot_destroy functions
2. Tools/rbw/rbgm_ManualProcedures.sh - find depot_initialize function
3. Tools/rbw/rbgc_Constants.sh - find DC-related constants
4. Tools/rbw/rbgg_Governor.sh - find create_director and rubric_preflight functions
5. Tools/rbw/rbrr_regime.sh - find GDC variable enrollment
6. Tools/rbw/rbra_regime.sh - find RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL enrollment
7. Tools/rbw/rbz_zipper.sh - find depot_initialize enrollment
8. Tools/rbw/rbgm_cli.sh - find depot_initialize dispatch
9. .rbk/rbrr.env - current variable values

For each file, note the line ranges of the relevant sections so we know exactly what to modify.

   490→rbgm_depot_initialize() {
   491→  zrbgm_sentinel
   492→
   493→  buc_doc_brief "Validate GitHub PAT and complete Developer Connect OAuth authorization"
   494→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   495→
   496→  local z_project="${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   497→  local z_gdc_conn="${RBRR_GDC_CONNECTION_NAME}"
   498→  local z_gdc_region="${RBRR_GDC_REGION}"
   499→  local z_governor_rbra="${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}"
   500→
   501→  buc_step 'Authenticate as Governor'
   502→  test -f "${z_governor_rbra}" || buc_die "Governor RBRA file not found: ${z_governor_rbra} — run rbgp_governor_reset"
   503→  source "${z_governor_rbra}" || buc_die "Failed to source Governor RBRA: ${z_governor_rbra}"
   504→  zrbra_kindle
   505→  zrbra_enforce
   506→  zrbra_lock
   507→
   508→  buc_step 'Load Rubric Repo URL'
   509→  local z_rubric_repo_url="${RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL:-}"
   510→  if test -z "${z_rubric_repo_url}"; then
   511→    buc_info ""
   512→    buc_info "RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL is not set in Governor RBRA file."
   513→    buc_info ""
   514→    bug_section "Set up a rubric repository"
   515→    bug_e
   516→    bug_t        "   The rubric repository stores Recipe Bottle build manifests."
   517→    bug_t        "   Any git host works; GitHub instructions shown as reference."
   518→    bug_e
   519→    bug_link     "   1. " "Create a new repository" "https://github.com/new" " on GitHub"
   520→    bug_tut      "      (e.g., " "rb-rubric" " — can be private, initialize empty)"
   521→    bug_e
   522→    bug_t        "   2. Create a fine-grained Personal Access Token (PAT):"
   523→    bug_link     "      " "GitHub Fine-Grained Tokens" "https://github.com/settings/personal-access-tokens/new"
   524→    bug_t        "      • Resource owner: your org or personal account"
   525→    bug_t        "      • Repository access: Only select repositories → the rubric repo"
   526→    bug_tu       "      • Repository permissions: Contents → " "Read and write"
   527→    bug_e
   528→    bug_t        "   3. Construct the authenticated URL:"
   529→    bug_c        "      https://x-access-token:<PAT>@github.com/<org>/<repo>.git"
   530→    bug_e
   531→    bug_t        "   4. Add to Governor RBRA file:"
   532→    bug_c        "      RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL=https://x-access-token:<YOUR-PAT>@github.com/<org>/rb-rubric.git"
   533→    bug_e
   534→    buc_die "Set RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL in Governor RBRA file and re-run"
   535→  fi
   536→
   537→  buc_step 'Validate Rubric Repo URL'
   538→  git ls-remote "${z_rubric_repo_url}" HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1 \
   539→    || buc_die "Rubric repo URL is unreachable or credentials are invalid — check RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL"
   540→  buc_info "Rubric repo URL validated"
   541→
   542→  buc_step 'Check Developer Connect connection status'
   543→  local z_token
   544→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_governor_rbra}") || buc_die "Failed to get Governor OAuth token"
   545→
   546→  local z_conn_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_DEVELOPERCONNECT}${RBGC_DEVELOPERCONNECT_V1}/projects/${z_project}/locations/${z_gdc_region}/connections/${z_gdc_conn}"
   547→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_conn_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_init_conn_get"
   548→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Get Developer Connect connection" "depot_init_conn_get"
   549→
   550→  local z_stage
   551→  z_stage=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_init_conn_get" '.installationState.stage // "UNKNOWN"') \
   552→    || buc_die "Failed to parse connection stage"
   553→
   554→  if [ "${z_stage}" = "COMPLETE" ]; then
   555→    buc_info "Developer Connect connection already active — skipping OAuth step"
   556→  else
   557→    buc_step 'Grant operator console access for Developer Connect'
   558→    local z_operator_email="${RBRP_OPERATOR_EMAIL:-}"
   559→    test -n "${z_operator_email}" || buc_die "RBRP_OPERATOR_EMAIL not set — run payor_install to discover operator email"
   560→    rbgi_add_project_iam_role \
   561→      "${z_token}" \
   562→      "Grant Operator Developer Connect Admin" \
   563→      "projects/${z_project}" \
   564→      "roles/developerconnect.admin" \
   565→      "user:${z_operator_email}" \
   566→      "operator-devconnect"
   567→    buc_info "Granted ${z_operator_email} Developer Connect admin on ${z_project}"
   568→
   569→    buc_step 'Guide GitHub OAuth authorization'
   570→    local z_action_uri
   571→    z_action_uri=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_init_conn_get" '.installationState.actionUri // ""') \
   572→      || buc_die "Failed to parse authorization URI"
   573→    test -n "${z_action_uri}" || buc_die "No authorization URI available — connection stage: ${z_stage}"
   574→
   575→    buc_info ""
   576→    buc_info "Developer Connect connection requires GitHub OAuth authorization."
   577→    buc_info ""
   578→    bug_section "Complete GitHub OAuth:"
   579→    bug_t        "   Open this URL in your browser:"
   580→    bug_e
   581→    bug_link     "   " "Authorize Developer Connect" "${z_action_uri}"
   582→    bug_e
   583→    bug_t        "   GCP Console:"
   584→    bug_tut      "   1. " "Request GitHub OAuth token" " page appears"
   585→    bug_tu       "   2. Click " "I understand and continue"
   586→    bug_e
   587→    bug_t        "   GitHub:"
   588→    bug_tut      "   3. " "Install Google Cloud Developer Connect" " — select account/org hosting rubric repo"
   589→    bug_tu       "   4. Repository access: select " "Only select repositories"
   590→    bug_t        "   5. Pick the rubric repo from the dropdown"
   591→    bug_tu       "   6. Click " "Install"
   592→    bug_e
   593→    bug_t        "   GitHub redirects back to GCP; OAuth token stored in Secret Manager."
   594→    bug_e
   595→    buc_info "After completing the flow above, press Enter to continue..."
   596→    read -r
   597→
   598→    buc_step 'Poll connection until active'
   599→    local z_poll_count=0
   600→    local z_max_polls=$(( RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC / RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC ))
   601→
   602→    while true; do
   603→      z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_governor_rbra}") || buc_die "Failed to refresh Governor OAuth token"
   604→      rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_conn_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_init_conn_poll"
   605→      rbgu_http_require_ok "Poll Developer Connect connection" "depot_init_conn_poll"
   606→
   607→      z_stage=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_init_conn_poll" '.installationState.stage // "UNKNOWN"') \
   608→        || buc_die "Failed to parse connection stage"
   609→
   610→      if [ "${z_stage}" = "COMPLETE" ]; then
   611→        buc_info "Developer Connect connection is now active"
   612→        break
   613→      fi
   614→
   615→      z_poll_count=$((z_poll_count + 1))
   616→      if [ "${z_poll_count}" -ge "${z_max_polls}" ]; then
   617→        buc_die "Developer Connect OAuth did not complete after ${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}s — re-open the authorization URI and try again"
   618→      fi
   619→
   620→      buc_log_args "Connection stage: ${z_stage} (poll ${z_poll_count}/${z_max_polls})"
   621→      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
   622→    done
   623→  fi
   624→
   625→  buc_step 'Final validation'
   626→  buc_info "Running final validation..."
   627→  git ls-remote "${z_rubric_repo_url}" HEAD >/dev/null 2>&1 \
   628→    || buc_die "Rubric repo URL validation failed on final check"
   629→
   630→  # Re-verify connection
   631→  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_governor_rbra}") || buc_die "Failed to refresh Governor OAuth token"
   632→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_conn_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_init_conn_final"
   633→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Final Developer Connect check" "depot_init_conn_final"
   634→  z_stage=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_init_conn_final" '.installationState.stage // "UNKNOWN"') \
   635→    || buc_die "Failed to parse connection stage"
   636→  test "${z_stage}" = "COMPLETE" || buc_die "Developer Connect connection not COMPLETE: ${z_stage}"
   637→
   638→  buc_success "Depot initialization complete"
   639→  buc_info "Rubric repo: validated via git ls-remote"
   640→  buc_info "Developer Connect: active (${z_gdc_conn})"
   641→  buc_info "Ready for rubric inscribe operations"
   642→}

    22→
    23→# Multiple inclusion detection
    24→# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
    25→test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
    26→ZRBGC_SOURCED=1

    31→zrbgc_kindle() {
    32→  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
    33→
    34→  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
    35→  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
    36→  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
    37→  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
    38→  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
    39→  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
    40→  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
    41→  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
    42→  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
    43→  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
    44→  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX=10
    45→
    46→  # Global resource validation patterns
    47→  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS

   158→######################################################################
   159→# External Functions (rbgc_*)
   160→
   161→# GCB machine type to vCPU mapping (default pool and private pool types).
   162→#
   163→# Provenance (verified 2026-02-13):
   164→#   Enum names from Cloud Build API BuildOptions.MachineType:
   165→#     https://cloud.google.com/dotnet/docs/reference/Google.Cloud.CloudBuild.V1/latest/Google.Cloud.CloudBuild.V1.BuildOptions.Types.MachineType
   166→#   That reference gives enum names and CPU counts for most types but
   167→#   describes UNSPECIFIED only as "Standard machine type" without a
   168→#   vCPU count.
   169→#
   170→#   The UNSPECIFIED=2 vCPU value was inferred from:
   171→#     1. Google web search result stating default is e2-standard-2 (2 vCPU)
   172→#     2. Empirical: with 10-CPU quota, two UNSPECIFIED builds started
   173→#        concurrently (impossible if >=6 vCPU each)
   174→#     3. Consistent with project's own RBRR comment and 5-concurrent
   175→#        builds observed at 10-CPU quota
   176→#   No single authoritative Google document was found that explicitly
   177→#   maps UNSPECIFIED to a vCPU count for the default pool.
   178→#
   179→# If Google adds new machine types, this function will hard-fail on
   180→# the unknown value, forcing an update here.
   181→rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture() {
   182→  zrbgc_sentinel
   183→  local z_machine_type="$1"
   184→  case "${z_machine_type}" in
   185→    UNSPECIFIED)    echo 2  ;;
   186→    E2_MEDIUM)      echo 1  ;;
   187→    E2_HIGHCPU_8)   echo 8  ;;
   188→    E2_HIGHCPU_32)  echo 32 ;;
   189→    N1_HIGHCPU_8)   echo 8  ;;
   190→    N1_HIGHCPU_32)  echo 32 ;;
   191→    E2_STANDARD_2)  echo 2  ;;
   192→    E2_STANDARD_4)  echo 4  ;;
   193→    E2_STANDARD_8)  echo 8  ;;
   194→    E2_STANDARD_16) echo 16 ;;
   195→    E2_STANDARD_32) echo 32 ;;
   196→    *) buc_die "Unknown GCB machine type: ${z_machine_type} — update rbgc_gcb_machine_vcpus_capture" ;;
   197→  esac
   198→}

    22→# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    23→# Operational Invariants (RBGG is single writer; 409 is fatal)
    24→#
    25→# - Single admin actor: All RBGG operations are executed by a single admin
    26→#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
    27→# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGG init/creation flows assume the project
    28→#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
    29→#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
    30→# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
    31→#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGG.
    32→#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
    33→# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    34→
    35→set -euo pipefail
    36→
    37→# Multiple inclusion detection
    38→test -z "${ZRBGG_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"

    41→######################################################################

    48→  test   "${#RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" -gt 0 || buc_die "RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty"

    50→  buc_log_args 'Ensure dependencies are kindled first'
    51→  zrbgc_sentinel
    52→  zrbgo_sentinel
    53→  zrbgu_sentinel
    54→  zrbgi_sentinel
    55→
    56→  readonly ZRBGG_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_"
    57→  readonly ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGG_PREFIX}empty.json"
    58→  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGG_EMPTY_JSON}"

    61→  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE="create"
    62→  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY="verify"

    98→######################################################################
    99→# Rubric infrastructure preflight — sources Governor RBRA, checks repo URL + DevConnect

   101→zrbgg_rubric_preflight() {
   102→  zrbgg_sentinel
   103→
   104→  local z_gov_rbra="${RBRR_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}"
   105→  test -f "${z_gov_rbra}" || buc_die "Governor RBRA file not found: ${z_gov_rbra} — run rbgp_governor_reset"
   106→
   107→  if test -z "${ZRBRA_SOURCED:-}"; then
   108→    source "${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}/rbra_regime.sh"
   109→  fi
   110→
   111→  source "${z_gov_rbra}" || buc_die "Failed to source Governor RBRA: ${z_gov_rbra}"
   112→  zrbra_kindle

   120→

   130→######################################################################
   131→# Capture: list required services that are NOT enabled (blank = all enabled)
   132→zrbgg_required_apis_missing_capture() {
   133→  zrbgg_sentinel
   134→
   135→  local z_token="${1:-}"
   136→  test -n "${z_token}" || { echo ""; return 1; }
   137→
   138→  local z_missing=""
   139→  local z_api=""
   140→  local z_service=""
   141→  local z_infix=""
   142→  local z_state=""
   143→  local z_code=""
   144→
   145→  for z_api in                       \
   146→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_CRM}"      \
   147→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_GAR}"      \
   148→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_IAM}"      \
   149→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_BUILD}"    \
   150→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_ANALYSIS}" \
   151→    "${RBGC_API_SU_VERIFY_STORAGE}"
   152→  do
   153→    z_service="${z_api##*/}"
   154→    z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_API_CHECK}_${z_service}"
   155→
   156→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_api}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}" || true
   157→
   158→    buc_log_args 'If we cannot even read an HTTP code file, that is a processing failure.'
   159→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || z_code=""
   160→    test -n "${z_code}" || return 1
   161→
   162→    if test "${z_code}" = "200"; then
   163→      z_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" ".state") || z_state=""
   164→      test "${z_state}" = "ENABLED" || z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   165→    else
   166→      buc_log_args 'Any non-200 (403/404/5xx/etc) => treat as NOT enabled'
   167→      z_missing="${z_missing} ${z_service}"
   168→    fi
   169→  done
   170→
   171→  printf '%s' "${z_missing# }"
   172→}

   174→zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key() {
   175→  zrbgg_sentinel
   176→
   177→  local z_account_name="$1"
   178→  local z_display_name="$2"
   179→  local z_description="$3"
   180→  local z_instance="$4"
   181→
   182→  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"
   183→
   184→  buc_step 'Get OAuth token from admin'
   185→  local z_token
   186→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   187→
   188→  buc_step "Create request JSON for ${z_account_name}"
   189→  jq -n                                      \
   190→    --arg account_id "${z_account_name}"     \
   191→    --arg display_name "${z_display_name}"   \
   192→    --arg description "${z_description}"     \
   193→    '{
   194→      accountId: $account_id,
   195→      serviceAccount: {
   196→        displayName: $display_name,
   197→        description: $description
   198→      }
   199→    }' > "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json" || buc_die "Failed to create request JSON"
   200→
   201→  buc_step 'Create service account via REST API'
   202→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}" "${z_token}" \
   203→    "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json"
   204→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Create service account" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}"
   205→
   206→  local z_sa_uid
   207→  z_sa_uid=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" '.uniqueId') \
   208→    || buc_die "Failed to get uniqueId from SA creation response"
   209→  buc_info "Service account created: ${z_account_email} (uid: ${z_sa_uid})"
   210→
   211→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_sa_uid}" \
   212→                                   "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY}"
   213→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Verify service account" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY}"
   214→
   215→  buc_step 'Preflight: ensure no existing USER_MANAGED keys (manual cleanup path)'
   216→
   217→  buc_log_args 'List keys'
   218→  rbgu_http_json "GET"                                                        \
   219→    "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}"        \
   220→                                      "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}"
   221→  rbgu_http_require_ok "List service account keys" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}"
   222→
   223→  buc_log_args 'Count existing user-managed keys'
   224→  local z_user_keys
   225→  z_user_keys=$(jq -r '[.keys[]? | select(.keyType=="USER_MANAGED")] | length' \
   226→                 "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}") \
   227→    || buc_die "Failed to parse service account keys"
   228→
   229→  if test "${z_user_keys}" -gt 0; then
   230→    buc_log_args 'Provide a console URL to delete keys manually, then rerun this command'
   231→    local z_sa_email_enc="${z_account_email//@/%40}"
   232→    local z_keys_url="${RBGC_CONSOLE_URL}iam-admin/serviceaccounts/details/${z_sa_email_enc}?project=${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   233→
   234→    buc_warn "Found ${z_user_keys} existing USER_MANAGED key(s) on ${z_account_email}."
   235→    buc_info "Open Console, select the **Keys** tab, delete old keys, then rerun:"
   236→    buc_info "  ${z_keys_url}"
   237→    buc_die  "Aborting to avoid minting additional keys."
   238→  fi
   239→
   240→  buc_step 'Generate service account key'
   241→  local z_key_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_key_request.json"
   242→  printf '%s' '{"privateKeyType": "TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE"}' > "${z_key_req}"
   243→  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}" \
   244→                                         "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}" "${z_key_req}"
   245→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Generate service account key" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}"
   246→
   247→  buc_step 'Extract and decode key data'
   248→  local z_key_b64
   249→  z_key_b64=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}" '.privateKeyData') \
   250→    || buc_die "Failed to extract privateKeyData"
   251→  local z_key_json="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_key_${z_instance}.json"
   252→  buc_log_args 'Tolerate macos base64 difference'
   253→  if ! printf '%s' "${z_key_b64}" | base64 -d > "${z_key_json}" 2>/dev/null; then
   254→       printf '%s' "${z_key_b64}" | base64 -D > "${z_key_json}" 2>/dev/null \
   255→      || buc_die "Failed to decode key data"
   256→  fi
   257→
   258→  buc_step 'Convert JSON key to RBRA format'
   259→  local z_rbra_file="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${z_instance}.rbra"
   260→
   261→  local z_client_email
   262→  z_client_email=$(jq -r '.client_email' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email"
   263→  test -n "${z_client_email}" || buc_die "Empty client_email in key JSON"
   264→
   265→  local z_private_key
   266→  z_private_key=$(jq -r '.private_key' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key"
   267→  test -n "${z_private_key}" || buc_die "Empty private_key in key JSON"
   268→
   269→  local z_project_id
   270→  z_project_id=$(jq -r '.project_id' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id"
   271→  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "Empty project_id in key JSON"
   272→
   273→  buc_step 'Write RBRA file' "${z_rbra_file}"
   274→  {
   275→    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "$z_client_email"
   276→    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "$z_private_key"; printf '"\n'
   277→    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "$z_project_id"
   278→    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=1800\n'
   279→  } > "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
   280→
   281→  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
   282→
   283→  rm -f "${z_key_json}"

   321→zrbgg_list_bucket_objects_capture() {
   322→  zrbgg_sentinel
   323→
   324→  local z_token="${1}"
   325→  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
   326→
   327→  local z_list_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o"
   328→  local z_page_token=""
   329→  local z_first=1
   330→
   331→  while :; do
   332→    buc_log_args "Build URL with optional pageToken -> ${z_first}"
   333→    local z_url="${z_list_url_base}"
   334→    if test -n "${z_page_token}"; then
   335→      buc_log_args 'pageToken must be URL-encoded'
   336→      local z_tok_enc
   337→      z_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_page_token}") || return 1
   338→      z_url="${z_url}?pageToken=${z_tok_enc}"
   339→    fi
   340→
   341→    buc_log_args 'Use a unique infix per page to avoid clobbering files'
   342→    local z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_LIST}${z_first}"
   343→    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}"
   344→
   345→    local z_code
   346→    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
   347→    test "${z_code}" = "200" || return 1
   348→
   349→    buc_log_args 'Print names from this page (if any)'
   350→    buc_log_args 'Next page?'
   351→    jq -r                '.items[]?.name // empty' "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"  || return 1
   352→    z_page_token=$(jq -r '.nextPageToken // empty' "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}") || return 1
   353→
   354→    test -n "${z_page_token}" || break
   355→    z_first=$((z_first + 1))
   356→  done
   357→}

   375→zrbgg_empty_gcs_bucket() {
   376→  zrbgg_sentinel
   377→
   378→  local z_token="${1}"
   379→  local z_bucket_name="${2}"
   380→
   381→  buc_log_args 'Get list of objects to delete'
   382→  local z_objects
   383→  z_objects=$(zrbgg_list_bucket_objects_capture "${z_token}" "${z_bucket_name}") || {
   384→    buc_log_args 'No objects found or bucket not accessible'
   385→    return 0
   386→  }
   387→
   388→  test -n "${z_objects}" || { buc_log_args 'Bucket is empty'; return 0; }
   389→
   390→  buc_log_args 'Delete each object'
   391→  local z_object=""
   392→  local z_delete_url=""
   393→  local z_delete_code=""
   394→  while IFS= read -r z_object; do
   395→    test -n "${z_object}" || continue
   396→    buc_log_args "Deleting object: ${z_object}"
   397→
   398→    local z_object_enc
   399→    z_object_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_object}") || z_object_enc=""
   400→    test -n "${z_object_enc}" || { buc_warn "Failed to encode object name: ${z_object}"; continue; }
   401→    z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o/${z_object_enc}"
   402→
   403→    rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" \
   404→                              "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE}"
   405→    z_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_OBJECT_DELETE}") || z_delete_code=""
   406→    case "${z_delete_code}" in
   407→      204|404) buc_log_args "Object ${z_object}: deleted or not found"                     ;;
   408→      *)       buc_warn     "Object ${z_object}: Failed to delete (HTTP ${z_delete_code})" ;;
   409→    esac
   410→  done <<< "${z_objects}"
   411→}

   638→rbgg_destroy_project() {
   639→  zrbgg_sentinel
   640→  buc_doc_brief "DEPRECATED: Use rbgp_project_delete instead - moved to Payor module for billing/destructive ops"
   641→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   642→
   643→  buc_warn "========================================================================"
   644→  buc_warn "DEPRECATION NOTICE: rbgg_destroy_project is deprecated"
   645→  buc_warn "========================================================================"
   646→  buc_warn ""
   647→  buc_warn "Project deletion has been moved to the Payor module which handles"
   648→  buc_warn "all billing and destructive lifecycle operations."
   649→  buc_warn ""

   652→  buc_warn ""

   654→  buc_warn "billing detachment, and project restoration capabilities."
   655→  buc_warn "========================================================================"
   656→
   657→  buc_die "Function moved to Payor module - use rbgp_project_delete"
   658→
   659→  if [[ "${DEBUG_ONLY:-0}" != "1" ]]; then
   660→    buc_die "This dangerous operation requires DEBUG_ONLY=1 environment variable"
   661→  fi
   662→
   663→  buc_step 'Mint admin OAuth token'
   664→  local z_token
   665→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   666→
   667→  buc_step 'Triple confirmation required'

   671→  buc_warn "  Project: ${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   672→  buc_warn "This will:"
   673→  buc_warn "  - Delete ALL resources in the project"
   674→  buc_warn "  - Delete ALL data permanently"
   675→  buc_warn "  - Break billing associations"
   676→  buc_warn "  - Make the project unusable immediately"

   678→  buc_warn "========================================================================"

   680→
   681→  buc_require "Type the exact project ID to confirm deletion" "${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
   682→  buc_require "Confirm you understand this DELETES EVERYTHING in the project" "DELETE-EVERYTHING"
   683→  buc_require "Final confirmation - type OBLITERATE to proceed" "OBLITERATE"
   684→
   685→  buc_step 'Check for liens (will block deletion)'
   686→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens?parent=projects/${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_LIENS}"

   703→  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${RBGD_API_CRM_DELETE_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_DELETE}"
   704→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete project" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_DELETE}"

   716→    buc_step "Grace period: Up to 30 days"
   717→    buc_code "To restore (if still possible): rbgg_restore_project"
   718→    buc_step "WARNING: Project is now unusable but may remain visible in listings"

   724→rbgg_restore_project() {
   725→  zrbgg_sentinel
   726→  buc_doc_brief "Attempt to restore a deleted project within the 30-day grace period"
   727→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   728→
   729→  buc_step 'Mint admin OAuth token'
   730→  local z_token
   731→  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"
   732→
   733→  buc_step 'Check current project state'
   734→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_CRM_GET_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"

   556→rbgp_depot_create() {
   557→  zrbgp_sentinel
   558→
   559→  local z_depot_name="${1:-}"
   560→  local z_region="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"
   561→
   562→  buc_doc_brief "Create new depot infrastructure following RBAGS specification"
   563→  buc_doc_param "depot_name" "Depot name (lowercase/numbers/hyphens, max ${RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX} chars)"

   565→
   566→  buc_step 'Validate input parameters'
   567→  test -n "${z_depot_name}" || buc_die "Depot name required as first argument"
   568→  
   569→  if ! printf '%s' "${z_depot_name}" | grep -qE '^[a-z0-9-]+$'; then
   570→    buc_die "Depot name must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens"
   571→  fi
   572→  
   573→  if [ "${#z_depot_name}" -gt "${RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX}" ]; then
   574→    buc_die "Depot name must be ${RBGC_GLOBAL_DEPOT_NAME_MAX} characters or less"
   575→  fi
   576→
   577→  # Validate region exists in Artifact Registry locations

   579→  local z_token

   581→

   584→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate region" "region_validation"
   585→  
   586→  local z_valid_regions

   588→

   590→    buc_die "Invalid region. Valid regions: ${z_valid_regions}"

   592→
   593→  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
   594→  test -n "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"

   596→  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID is not set"
   597→  
   598→  local z_token
   599→  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"
   600→
   601→  buc_step 'Generate depot project ID'
   602→  # Derive from dispatch timestamp to match tabtarget log filename
   603→  # BURD_NOW_STAMP = YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-PID-RANDOM
   604→  # RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT produces YYMMDDHHMMSS
   605→  local z_datepart="${BURD_NOW_STAMP%%-*}"
   606→  local z_rest="${BURD_NOW_STAMP#*-}"
   607→  local z_timepart="${z_rest%%-*}"
   608→  local z_timestamp="${z_datepart:2}${z_timepart}"

   610→

   628→

   630→  rbgu_http_json_lro_ok \

   633→    "${z_create_project_url}" \
   634→    "depot_project_create" \
   635→    "${z_create_project_body}" \
   636→    ".name" \
   637→    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}" \

   649→
   650→  local z_billing_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/billingInfo"
   651→  rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_billing_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_billing_link" "${z_billing_body}"
   652→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Link billing account" "depot_billing_link"
   653→
   654→  buc_step 'Get depot project number'

   657→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Get project info" "depot_project_info"

   662→  test -n "${z_project_number}" || buc_die "Project number is empty"
   663→
   664→  buc_step 'Enable depot project APIs'

   714→    "depot_repo_create" \
   715→    "${z_create_repo_body}" \

   718→    "${RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL}" \

   825→rbgp_depot_destroy() {
   826→  zrbgp_sentinel
   827→
   828→  local z_depot_project_id="${1:-}"
   829→
   830→  buc_doc_brief "DANGER: Permanently destroy an entire depot infrastructure"
   831→  buc_doc_param "depot_project_id" "The depot project ID to destroy"
   832→  buc_doc_shown || return 0
   833→
   834→  buc_step 'Safety confirmation required'
   835→  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "Depot project ID required as first argument (current RBRR: ${RBRR_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID})"
   836→
   837→  buc_require "DANGER: Permanently destroy depot ${z_depot_project_id} and ALL resources" "${z_depot_project_id}"
   838→
   839→  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
   840→  test -n "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"
   841→  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID is not set"
   842→  
   843→  local z_token
   844→  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"
   845→
   846→  buc_step 'Validate target depot'
   847→  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "Depot project ID required as first argument"
   848→  
   849→  local z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
   850→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_validate"
   851→  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "depot_destroy_validate"
   852→  
   853→  local z_lifecycle_state
   854→  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_validate" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"
   855→  
   856→  if [ "${z_lifecycle_state}" != "ACTIVE" ]; then
   857→    if [ "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED" ]; then
   858→      buc_die "Project already marked for deletion"
   859→    else
   860→      buc_die "Project state is ${z_lifecycle_state} - can only destroy ACTIVE projects"
   861→    fi
   862→  fi
   863→
   864→  buc_step 'Check for and remove liens'
   865→  local z_liens_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens?parent=projects%2F${z_depot_project_id}"
   866→  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_liens_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
   867→  rbgu_http_require_ok "List liens" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
   868→  
   869→  local z_lien_count
   870→  z_lien_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens // [] | length') || buc_die "Failed to parse liens response"
   871→  
   872→  if [ "${z_lien_count}" -gt 0 ]; then
   873→    buc_log_args "Found ${z_lien_count} lien(s) - removing them"
   874→    local z_lien_names
   875→    z_lien_names=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens[].name' | tr '\n' ' ') || buc_die "Failed to extract lien names"
   876→    
   877→    for z_lien_name in ${z_lien_names}; do
   878→      if [ -n "${z_lien_name}" ]; then
   879→        buc_log_args "Removing lien: ${z_lien_name}"
   880→        local z_delete_lien_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens/${z_lien_name}"
   881→        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_lien_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
   882→        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete lien" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
   883→      fi
   884→    done
   885→  fi
   886→
   887→  buc_step 'Unlink billing account (releases quota immediately)'
   888→  local z_billing_unlink_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_billing_unlink.json"
   889→  echo '{"billingAccountName":""}' > "${z_billing_unlink_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build billing unlink body"
   890→
   891→  local z_billing_unlink_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/billingInfo"
   892→  rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_billing_unlink_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_billing_unlink" "${z_billing_unlink_body}"
   893→
   894→  local z_billing_unlink_code
   895→  z_billing_unlink_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_billing_unlink") || z_billing_unlink_code=""

## Summary: Developer Connect Code Structure and Replacement Strategy

### Overview
This analysis identifies all Developer Connect (DC)-related code that references old variable names and API endpoints, which need to be replaced with updated versions following the CB v2 migration.

---

## 1. **depot_create Function** - `Tools/rbw/rbgp_Payor.sh`
**Line Range:** 556-823

### Current DC Implementation (Lines 781-805):
```bash
buc_step 'Create Developer Connect connection (PENDING state)'
local z_gdc_connection_name="rbw-${z_depot_name}-github"
local z_gdc_parent="projects/${z_depot_project_id}/locations/${z_region}"
local z_gdc_create_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_DEVELOPERCONNECT}${RBGC_DEVELOPERCONNECT_V1}/${z_gdc_parent}/connections?connectionId=${z_gdc_connection_name}"
local z_gdc_create_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_gdc_connection.json"

jq -n '{githubConfig: {githubApp: "DEVELOPER_CONNECT"}}' > "${z_gdc_create_body}" \
  || buc_die "Failed to build Developer Connect connection body"

rbgu_http_json_lro_ok \
  "Create Developer Connect connection" \
  "${z_token}" \
  "${z_gdc_create_url}" \
  "depot_gdc_create" \
  "${z_gdc_create_body}" \
  ".name" \
  "${RBGC_API_ROOT_DEVELOPERCONNECT}${RBGC_DEVELOPERCONNECT_V1}" \
  "${RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL}" \
  "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" \
  "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"

# Verify connection exists in pending state
local z_gdc_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_DEVELOPERCONNECT}${RBGC_DEVELOPERCONNECT_V1}/${z_gdc_parent}/connections/${z_gdc_connection_name}"
rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_gdc_get_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_gdc_verify"
rbgu_http_require_ok "Verify Developer Connect connection" "depot_gdc_verify"
```

### Key Points:
- Creates connection in PENDING state during depot creation
- Uses `githubConfig.githubApp: "DEVELOPER_CONNECT"`
- Connection resource: `projects/{id}/locations/{region}/connections/{name}`
- Output lines 814-822 display GDC configuration to user

---

## 2. **depot_destroy Function** - `Tools/rbw/rbgp_Payor.sh`
**Line Range:** 825-954

### DC-Related Code:
Currently does NOT explicitly delete the Developer Connect connection. The deletion relies on cascade delete when the project is deleted (lines 902-943).

**Potential Issue:** If CB v2 requires explicit cleanup of connections or linked infrastructure before project deletion, depot_destroy needs enhancement.

## 3. **depot_initialize Function** - `Tools/rbw/rbgm_ManualProcedures.sh`
**Line Range:** 490-642

### Current DC Implementation (Lines 541-623):
```bash
buc_step 'Check Developer Connect connection status'
local z_token
z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${z_governor_rbra}") || buc_die "Failed to get Governor OAuth token"

local z_conn_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_DEVELOPERCONNECT}${RBGC_DEVELOPERCONNECT_V1}/projects/${z_project}/locations/${z_gdc_region}/connections/${z_gdc_conn}"
rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_conn_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_init_conn_get"
rbgu_http_require_ok "Get Developer Connect connection" "depot_init_conn_get"

local z_stage
z_stage=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_init_conn_get" '.installationState.stage // "UNKNOWN"') \
  || buc_die "Failed to parse connection stage"

if [ "${z_stage}" = "COMPLETE" ]; then
  buc_info "Developer Connect connection already active — skipping OAuth step"
else
  # Grant operator console access for Developer Connect (lines 557-567)
  rbgi_add_project_iam_role \
    "${z_token}" \
    "Grant Operator Developer Connect Admin" \
    "projects/${z_project}" \
    "roles/developerconnect.admin" \
    "user:${z_operator_email}" \
    "operator-devconnect"
  
  # Guide GitHub OAuth authorization (lines 569-596)
  local z_action_uri
  z_action_uri=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_init_conn_get" '.installationState.actionUri // ""') \
    || buc_die "Failed to parse authorization URI"
  # ... user guidance flow ...
  
  # Poll connection until active (lines 598-622)
  # Loops checking stage until COMPLETE
fi

# Final validation (lines 625-642)
```

### Key Points:
- Loads RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL from Governor RBRA file (lines 508-535)
- Checks installation state stage (PENDING, COMPLETE, etc.)
- Retrieves actionUri for GitHub OAuth authorization flow
- Polls until stage = "COMPLETE"
- Validates rubric repo access twice (via git ls-remote)

### Files to Modify:

1. **`Tools/rbw/rbgp_Payor.sh`** (depot_create function, lines 781-805)
   - Replace Developer Connect creation request structure if CB v2 requires new JSON schema
   - Verify API endpoint path remains correct
   - Update response field parsing if installationState structure changed

2. **`Tools/rbw/rbgm_ManualProcedures.sh`** (depot_initialize function, lines 541-623)
   - Update API paths if CB v2 changed the REST endpoint structure
   - Verify response field names (`.installationState.stage`, `.installationState.actionUri`)
   - Confirm GitHub OAuth flow remains the same

3. **`Tools/rbw/rbgc_Constants.sh`** (if needed)
   - No changes required unless endpoint structure fundamentally changes

4. **`Tools/rbw/rbra_regime.sh`** (if RBRA_RUBRIC_REPO_URL name changes)

## Summary

The codebase has well-structured DC-related code concentrated in two main functions:
1. **`rbgp_depot_create`** - Creates DC connection during depot provisioning
2. **`rbgm_depot_initialize`** - Authorizes GitHub access via DC OAuth flow

Both functions use clear variable naming (`z_gdc_*` locals, `RBRR_GDC_*` regime vars) and follow consistent patterns for API interactions. The CB v2 migration will likely involve:
- Verifying API endpoint structure hasn't changed
- Checking JSON request/response schema if new
